payload:
This project implements read operations of reports and allocations using Playwright.

Expand the read operations to include the business purpose and comments fields of report transactions.

Implement write operations on report transactions that include:

- type
- business purpose
- comment

Document and build tests for this new functionality.  The session is currently authenticated, take care not to lose it so independent development can continue without user intervention.

Task is complete when... [truncated, 580 chars total]
Implemented, verified, and committed transaction CRUD operations and test suite.
